alkylation reagent: iodoacetamide (Sigma-Aldrich, I1149) was added to a final concentration of 50 mM
alkylation concentration: iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 50 mM
cleavage agent: digestion with 0.3 μg trypsin (Promega V5113) for 2 h
instrument: analysed by LC–MS on a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
labeling: SILAC-labelled nuclear extracts were prepared from HeLa S3 cells
